name: Kentico
description: Kentico is an enterprise .NET CMS and digital experience platform offering REST and GraphQL APIs for managing web content, e-commerce, digital marketing, and personalization.

itemListElement.name: Kentico Headless GraphQL API
itemListElement.description: Auto-generated GraphQL API endpoint for each headless channel in Xperience by Kentico. Supports querying content items with filtering, sorting, pagination, linked items, language variants, taxonomy tags, assets, and rich text.

itemListElement.name: Kentico Management REST API
itemListElement.description: Built-in REST service for reading, creating, updating, and deleting pages and CMS objects within Xperience by Kentico.

itemListElement.name: Kentico .NET Content API
itemListElement.description: Server-side .NET API for content item queries, object queries, file system operations, and database access within Xperience by Kentico applications.
